rules._comment: Escape hatch: disk-used % is (total-free)/total — not expressible in the structured query IR. The clickhouse.disks.free_space / clickhouse.disks.total_space metrics are emitted by a custom_queries block in the Datadog ClickHouse check (1-platform/2-monitoring/.../datadog/common/main.tf), tagged with disk_name and kube_cluster_name.

annotations.description: Warn when ClickHouse disk usage exceeds 80%; critical at 90%. Recovery at 75% (warn) / 85% (critical).

datadog.message: ClickHouse disk {{disk_name.name}} on {{host.name}} (cluster {{kube_cluster_name.name}}) has exceeded disk usage thresholds (warn 80%, critical 90%).
